coachAM: Your journal entries reveal a consistent pattern of high aspirations and gratitude for opportunities, yet a profound struggle to translate those intentions into disciplined execution, particularly around foundational physical and mental habits like sleep and training; the recurring "loop scrolling" and "laziness" you identify are symptoms of an underlying energy crisis and lack of self-regulation, not just distractions. The root cause is a fundamental disconnect between your declared identity ("best worker, best seller, charismatic with disciplina and efficiency") and your demonstrated daily discipline, which will inevitably cap your trajectory at the ceiling of your weakest habit, not your strongest ambition. Today, before anything else, block out 9:30 PM in your calendar as a non-negotiable hard stop for all inputs and activity, then execute your Sleep Protocol without exception.
